My permanently underwhelmed teenage nephews said it was the best pizza they  ever had!Price per person£10–20Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5Recommended dishesPizza Margherita, Vodka Pie, Sardenara, Pepperoni Pizza, Cheese BallsNoise levelModerate noiseSeating typeIndoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

Took our teenage nephews here to play the games consoles and have a pizza as a means to occupy the afternoon.
So glad we did as wow this was the best pizza! Genuinely fabulous. We had the phoenix pie and all of us were very happy with it. One of the best pizzas I've ever had. Both nephews said repeatedly was the best pizza they've ever had.
We also had potato tots, Mac and cheese bites as well as chicken strips. OMG the strips were delicious.
Everything really good.
Highly recommend.Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5
